confidence.formula_text: Base confidence starts at 0.5. Add 0.1 for each correlated independent signal up to a maximum addition of 0.4. Add 0.1 if an active weather alert from PMD API is confirmed. Subtract 0.1 if all signals are older than 20 minutes. Subtract 0.1 if only one source type is represented. The minimum possible score is 0.2. The maximum possible score is 1.0.
